  • Uses of AbstractProofReplayer in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.replay

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CopyingProofReplayer
    Replayer that copies proof steps from one proof to another.

  • Uses of AbstractProofReplayer in org.key_project.slicing

    Subclasses of AbstractProofReplayer in org.key_project.slicing
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    SlicingProofReplayer
    Proof slicer: constructs a new proof based on the original proof by omitting some steps that are not required to complete the proof (as indicated by the provided analysis results).
